description: Plugin-distributed hooks for behavioral-health-practice. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: review this Behavioral Health Practice deliverable against the §3 house opinions (baseline on every metric, source+date on every benchmark, no patient PHI). Set BEHAVIORAL_HEALTH_PRACTICE_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
